case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. AKILAH J ABRAHAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, AKILAH J DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-19-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-31-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17268062)
